title: More Essentials
description: This mod adds crafting recipes to items like the chainmail armor and items that should be in Minecraft.
body:
# Info:
## Description:
Mod that adds crafting recipes to items like the chainmail armor, items that should be in Minecraft and custom ores and stuff.
## Crafting Recipes:
Here you'll find the crafting recipes of the items.
### Chainmail Armor:
Crafted with chains in shape like the other armor.
### Steel Armor:
Crafted with steel in shape like the other armor.
### Steel Tools:
Crafted with steel like every other toolset.
### Ruby Armor:
Crafted with rubys in shape like the other armor.
### Ruby Tools:
Crafted with ruby like every other toolset.
### Enchanted Golden Apple / Notch Apple:
Crafted with 8 gold blocks around the apple in the middle.
### Diamond Apple:
Crafted with 8 diamonds around the apple in the middle.
### Enchanted Diamond Apple:
Crafted with 8 diamonds blocks around the apple in the middle.
### Totem of Undying:
Crafted with 4 gold blocks at the top, bottom, left, right and an emerald in the middle.
### Steel Block:
Crafted with 9 steel ingots.
### Ruby Block:
Crafted with 9 rubys.
